canonical_definition: SYNC (SYNthetic Contexts) is a synthetic long-context evaluation suite with graph understanding and unseen-language translation tasks designed for controlled comparisons of LLM capabilities.
papers: DIWALI- Diversity and Inclusivity aWare cuLture specific Items forIndia: Dataset and Assessment ofLLMs for Cultural Text Adaptation inIndian Context
